data.body: Implemented Option B in worktree bugfix/sidecar-prune-lock. Added event_append.delete_events(tracker, relpaths, msg): acquires write_lock, checks rebase guard, git rm + PATHSPEC-scoped git commit (git commit -- <paths>, never whole-index), routes git through _with_index_lock_retry, restores deletions on commit failure. Routed all four sidecar prunes (plan_review, code_review, completion, overlap/digest) through it; each keeps its best-effort try/except. New test tests/unit/test_store_delete_events.py (4 cases incl. the anti-sweep property: a concurrent writer's staged blob is NOT swept into the prune commit). Local: lint + typecheck green; targeted store tests + new tests green (27 passed). Full make test running for CI pre-flight.
